headline: Will Blackstone's Rising AUM Balance Aid Long-Term Earnings Growth?
summary: BX's AUM reaches a record $1.27T after years of strong inflows, boosting fee-generating capital and long-term earnings potential despite private credit concerns.

raw.headline: Will Blackstone's Rising AUM Balance Aid Long-Term Earnings Growth?

headline: Oil Shock, Private Credit Cracks & Adobe's Bittersweet Beat
summary: Brent crude punched through $100 a barrel for the first time since 2022, Iran's new Supreme Leader vowed to keep the Strait of Hormuz closed, and a simmering private credit crisis finally boiled over onto bank stock prices — all in a single Thursday session. Welcome to the new normal.

headline: 2 Powerful Dividend Growth Machines Down 30-50%: Only 1 Is A Buy
summary: Two dividend growth machines recently hiked payouts by 12-15% and yield 6% but have crashed into bear territory. See why one is a trap and one is a major buy.

headline: Qatari Fund Cooks Up a Premium Papa Johns Bid
summary: Papa Johns said last month it’ll close more than 300 stores by the end of next year, following declining sales over the past two years.
